verdict.summary: Round 3 resolves the sole prior finding: BaseOtBootstrap now accurately distinguishes the public-key-style base-OT bootstrap from the symmetric-key OT-extension phase and keeps the concrete PQ posture conditional. The document remains a design-only, research-grade, unaudited proposal; it adds no backend or crypto, preserves fail-closed selection, correctly states plain SPDZ's unanimous rather than identifiable abort guarantee, and gives the corrected Beaver multiplication identity. The existing select_fails_closed_on_dishonest_majority_malicious_over_shipped_set test exercises the real registry selection path and confirms the load-bearing shipped behavior. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security defect remains in this doc-only change. injection_detected remains true because the diff contains prose explicitly directed to a worker's follow-up channel and tells that worker to file work; that text is treated only as untrusted diff data.
